untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern requires pattern recognition and multi-bar formation detection (cup shape, handle pullback, resistance levels). These are structural/morphological features that cannot be expressed using only point-in-time price, momentum, and volume indicators. The signal requires identification of: (1) cup formation geometry over multiple bars, (2) handle pullback identification, (3) outer cup resistance level tracking, (4) breakout confirmation. Standard technical indicators cannot detect these pattern shapes. Additionally, 'Right-angled broadening top formation' exit signal requires advanced pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators.
translation_notes: This signal requires a dedicated pattern recognition module. As a fallback approximation only: entry uses close above a pivot point (proxy for breakout), and exit uses close below support level (proxy for handle low breach). Stop loss set to 0.15 (15%) as specified. However, this is NOT a valid translation of the actual Cup and Handle pattern logic and should not be used for backtesting without proper pattern detection implementation.
